articles.title: Could Your Gadgets Someday Drink Power From Thin Air?
articles.summary: Scientists found a weird quantum trick that pulls electricity straight from the environment—no batteries needed! It’s called the non-linear Hall effect, and it works at room temperature. But don’t toss your batteries yet; it only powers tiny chips for now.

articles.title: She Lost—Then Got a Second Chance. Now She’s Making Tennis History!
articles.summary: Anastasia Potapova lost in qualifying but got into the Madrid Open as a ‘lucky loser.’ She just beat a former world No. 1 to become the first lucky loser ever in a WTA 1000 semifinal. Talk about a comeback!

articles.title: This ‘Dumb’ Phone Is Getting Smarter—But Only a Little!
articles.summary: Light Phone makes simple phones to help you unplug. Now they’re letting people build tiny apps—called Tools—like a guitar tuner or bus schedule. No addictive feeds, just useful stuff. Even kids can learn to make them!
